caption:
Some roads don't lead anywhere specific — and that's exactly the point.

There is something quietly powerful about standing in the middle of vastness, dressed in nothing but darkness against the dust. A reminder that sometimes the most striking thing you can do is simply move forward, unhurried, on your own terms. This is the kind of energy we bring back from our travels and carry into every summer day on the island.

Pants & Vest: @diega_paris
